name: workout-dumbbell-holder-test-plug-sleeve-stub
description: Test print: plug + flange + shortened sleeve (25 mm) with hollow plug body and C-shape sleeve opening. Verifies plug-to-bore fit, sleeve-to-rail-OD fit, and sleeve inner surface quality in CF-reinforced filament before committing to the full v3.4 part.

dimensions.note: x = sleeve_od_wide (88.5). y = sleeve_od_narrow (62.5). z = flange_thickness (8) + sleeve_length_test (25) = 33 mm total print height.

volume.note: Hollow plug (3 mm walls) + flange + 25 mm sleeve. Full-solid equivalent would be ~90 cm3; hollowing saves ~40 cm3.

supportZones: Sleeve inner ceiling (Z=−8 face inside 78.5×53 mm cavity) — required, intentional test of support removal quality

verification.passCriteria: Plug slides into rail bore freely, withdraws with one-finger pull. Sleeve slides over rail OD with similar effort. Flange seats flush on rail-top face. No binding on any axis.
verification.failCriteria: Any binding during plug insertion or sleeve lowering. Sleeve inner wall residue that cannot be cleaned off.
verification.gatingDecision: PASS required before full v3.4 part is printed. If FAIL: adjust clearance_per_side in parent spec.json and re-model.
